title: Fix inline letter rendering and add animated letter-style tribute pages for the Sacred Six

requirements.summary: Fix HeroSection letter-by-letter animation to render characters inline instead of stacked vertically
acceptanceCriteria: The hero title text renders with characters/words flowing inline, not one character per line.
Letter-by-letter animation still plays as intended.
No horizontal overflow or clipping on standard viewport widths.

file_operations.description: Update the letter-by-letter title reveal implementation to apply inline or inline-block display styling to each animated letter span, ensuring characters flow naturally in a line rather than stacking vertically. Preserve the existing stagger animation timing and fade-in effects while fixing the layout issue.

requirements.summary: Create a dedicated Tribute Letters section with scroll-triggered handwritten-letter-style cards for each of the six friends
acceptanceCriteria: All six friends appear as distinct letter-style sections in the correct order: Tiya, Aaliya, Aaheli, Anshima, Anya, Manasvi.
Each section displays the emoji, name, title, subtitle, and full tribute message.
Scroll-triggered fade/slide-in entrance animation plays for each section as it enters the viewport.
Typography feels like an elegant handwritten letter — serif/display fonts, gold and warm-white tones, no generic card styling.
The section integrates into App.tsx alongside the existing sections.

file_operations.description: Create a new full-page section component that renders all six friends as handwritten-letter-style cards with scroll-triggered entrance animations. Each card should display the friend's emoji icon, name in uppercase gold typography, title, subtitle/epithet, and full prose tribute message. Use the existing dark gold aesthetic with serif/display fonts from the Tailwind config. Implement scroll-triggered fade/slide-in animations using the useScrollFadeIn hook for each letter card as it enters the viewport. Style the cards to feel like elegant handwritten letters with appropriate padding, subtle borders or frames, and rich typography hierarchy.

Import the new TributeLettersSection component and integrate it into the page flow between the SacredSixSection and TestimonySection. Ensure the section receives the same layered background treatment (behind MughalArchBackground and GoldParticles) and maintains consistent spacing with other sections.

requirements.summary: Implement six unique per-section background animations for the Tribute Letters page matching each friend's designated animation
acceptanceCriteria: Each of the six letter sections renders its designated animation as a background or ambient effect.
Animations are looping, subtle, and do not obscure the letter text.
Existing TributeAnimations components (heartbeat, constellation, crown, ripple) are reused or extended rather than duplicated.
No animation causes layout shifts or performance jank on scroll.

file_operations.description: Extend the existing animation components to add two new animation types: 'sun' (radiant warm sun glow emanating behind text for Anya) and 'shimmer' (soft fabric-like shimmer wave for Manasvi). Ensure all six animation types (heartbeat for Tiya, constellation for Aaliya, crown for Aaheli, ripple for Anshima, sun for Anya, shimmer for Manasvi) are exportable as standalone background components. Keep animations subtle, looping, and performant.

Update the AnimationType union to include 'sun' and 'shimmer' types. Verify that each friend object's animationType property matches the correct assignment: Tiya=heartbeat, Aaliya=constellation, Aaheli=crown, Anshima=ripple, Anya=sun, Manasvi=shimmer.

Integrate the designated background animation for each friend's letter card by rendering the appropriate animation component from TributeAnimations behind the letter content. Position animations as subtle ambient effects that do not interfere with text readability. Ensure animations are positioned absolutely or fixed relative to each card container and do not cause layout shifts during scroll or animation loops.

requirements.summary: Update friendsData.ts with complete tribute message content for all six friends as specified
acceptanceCriteria: Each friend object in friendsData.ts contains: name, emoji, title, subtitle/epithet, and full prose tribute message.
Text content matches the user-provided copy exactly.
Existing photo filenames and animation type assignments are preserved.

file_operations.description: Update each of the six friend objects to include the complete title, subtitle/epithet, and full multi-line prose tribute message exactly as specified in the BuildRequest: Tiya (THE HEARTBINDER / The One Who Stayed), Aaliya (THE QUIET INTELLECT / She Who Thinks in Starlight), Aaheli (THE STEADFAST ONE / Guardian of Unspoken Comfort), Anshima (THE TRUTHBEARER / Soft Voice, Strong Soul), Anya (THE LIGHTBRINGER / Smile of Steady Warmth), Manasvi (THE EMBRACE / Keeper of Warmth). Add a new 'message' or 'tribute' field to the Friend interface to hold the full prose content. Preserve all existing fields including photo filenames and animationType assignments.
